# CWE-618: Exposed Unsafe ActiveX Method (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-618-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os/exec"
)

// Vulnerable: HTTP endpoint exposes a privileged native helper without sandbox checks.
func InvokePluginMethod(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	method := r.URL.Query().Get("method")
	args := r.URL.Query().Get("args")
	cmd := exec.Command("/opt/vendor/activex-bridge", method, args)
	out, err := cmd.CombinedOutput()
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, string(out), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write(out)
}
